title: Chapter 16
text: Here are the words to RED RIVER VALLEY, the traditional cowboy song that Lonesome Luke played on the piano. From this valley they say you are going. I shall miss your sweet face and bright smile. For they say you are taking the sunshine That has brightened my pathway awhile. Refrain (after each verse): Come and sit by my side if you love me. Do not hasten to bid me adieu. For remember the Red River Valley And the cowboy who loved you so true.
